passes.title: Americas Stonehenge
passes.benefit_text:
Coupon pass admits four visitors to the Aviation Museum of New Hampshire free of charge.
Regular admission rates are $15 for people 13 and older, $7.50 for seniors, veterans, and children 6-12. Children 5 years old and younger are always free.
Pass is only valid on the day of the reservation.
source_phrases: Coupon pass admits four visitors to the Aviation Museum of New Hampshire free of charge.
Regular admission rates are $15 for people 13 and older, $7.50 for seniors, veterans, and children 6-12. Children 5 years old and younger are always free.
Pass is only valid on the day of the reservation.

passes.title: The Aviation Museum Of New Hampshire
Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Use the library pass code when ordering your tickets and receive 50% off each ticket!  You can select up to 4 tickets with this discount pass and children under 3 are free.
For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/
Select a date to visit Georges Island, Spectacle Island, or Paddocks Island from Hingham
Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details
Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply
Complete your transaction & bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry
source_phrases: Use the library pass code when ordering your tickets and receive 50% off each ticket!  You can select up to 4 tickets with this discount pass and children under 3 are free.
For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/
Select a date to visit Georges Island, Spectacle Island, or Paddocks Island from Hingham
Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details
Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply
Complete your transaction & bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text: Pass will provide 50% off general admission for up to 2 adults (18 years and over). All youth family members (ages 13-17) and children 12 years and under are free with accompanying adults. During their visit, pass holders may participate in any programs which are offered free with general admission (some programs may require a materials fee). Passes are valid any day the museum is open. Passes are not valid for "just-for-members" event, member discount at the Museum Shop, for admission to the Frank Lloyd Wright House Tours, or special ticketed events/exhibitions. Tours of the Frank Lloyd Wright Houses are a separate charge and require pre-paid reservations.
source_phrases: Pass will provide 50% off general admission for up to 2 adults (18 years and over). All youth family members (ages 13-17) and children 12 years and under are free with accompanying adults. During their visit, pass holders may participate in any programs which are offered free with general admission (some programs may require a materials fee). Passes are valid any day the museum is open. Passes are not valid for "just-for-members" event, member discount at the Museum Shop, for admission to the Frank Lloyd Wright House Tours, or special ticketed events/exhibitions. Tours of the Frank Lloyd Wright Houses are a separate charge and require pre-paid reservations.

passes.title: Currier Museum Of Art
passes.benefit_text:
Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions
Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This
offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a
Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors
aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library
Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov
source_phrases: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions
Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This
offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a
Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors
aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library
Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov
**You do not need to reserve this pass for the discount - just show a Massachusetts library card for each visitor**

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
source_phrases: DCR MassParks Pass (Department of Conservation and Recreation)- Entitles the bearer to FREE parking for one vehicle (excluding vans or buses) at Massachusetts parks.
Pick up and return to library.
Pass may be picked up the day before use.
Pass must be returned no later than the day after use.
Pass allows 1 car and up to 9 passengers into the state park or beach.
Pass is for day use only and CANNOT be used for camping.
Pass is available to Massachusetts residents only.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits 2 adults at $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each for special exhibition only; there is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission. Children 6 and under are admitted free.
After reserving this library's pass, you will receive a code that you must use to book timed tickets directly from the MFA website. Please also print this library pass confirmation and bring it with you or display it on a phone when you arrive.
source_phrases: Each pass admits 2 adults at $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each for special exhibition only; there is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission. Children 6 and under are admitted free.

After reserving this library's pass, you will receive a code that you must use to book timed tickets directly from the MFA website. Please also print this library pass confirmation and bring it with you or display it on a phone when you arrive.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
NO RESERVATION NEEDED. Present your Nevins Memorial Library card at the museum to receive free admission! The Museum of Printing is open every Saturday 10am - 4 pm 
**You do not need to reserve this pass for the discount just show your Nevins Library Card**
source_phrases: NO RESERVATION NEEDED. Present your Nevins Memorial Library card at the museum to receive free admission! The Museum of Printing is open every Saturday 10am - 4 pm
**You do not need to reserve this pass for the discount just show your Nevins Library Card**

passes.title: Museum Of Science
source_phrases: *This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
*Only applies to adult and child pricing.
*This is not a ticket.
*Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
*Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
*Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
*Valid only for Aquarium admission.
*This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
*Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
*Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
*  Hours of operation are subject to change.
This coupon is valid only for one day. You can either print it out and take it with you or display the pass on your phone or device. Either way, please be sure that the pass barcode is visible.
**Passes are not  available from May 22 to September 8**

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
20% discount on tickets purchased per show.
Tickets must be purchased on line at nhphil.org with library discount code.
source_phrases: 20% discount on tickets purchased per show.
Tickets must be purchased on line at nhphil.org with library discount code.

passes.title: New Hampshire Philharmonic Orchestra
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 2 people at $12 each.
Once you have your pass, you will need to reserve your date and time to visit the Peabody Essex Museum through the museum's website (my.pem.org/events).  Your library pass will have a promo code to use with your museum reservation to receive the discounted admission rate.
source_phrases: This pass admits 2 people at $12 each.

Once you have your pass, you will need to reserve your date and time to visit the Peabody Essex Museum through the museum's website (my.pem.org/events).  Your library pass will have a promo code to use with your museum reservation to receive the discounted admission rate.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text: this pass provides free admission to the Public Health Museum indoor exhibits and outdoor campus tour for up to two people.
source_phrases: this pass provides free admission to the Public Health Museum indoor exhibits and outdoor campus tour for up to two people.

passes.title: Public Health Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass allows two adults and up to four children into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount.
Pass will need to be presented to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant and the Center's greeter even if you already have reservations.
source_phrases: Each pass allows two adults and up to four children into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount.
Pass will need to be presented to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant and the Center's greeter even if you already have reservations.

passes.title: Seacoast Science Center
passes.benefit_text: Pass holders will receive free admission to the Museum. Each pass may only be used by one party per day. Parties are limited to five (5) or fewer guests. Appropriate for ages 2-99!
source_phrases: Pass holders will receive free admission to the Museum. Each pass may only be used by one party per day. Parties are limited to five (5) or fewer guests. Appropriate for ages 2-99!

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 6 people total at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child.
Does not include the Christmas Lights display.
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 6 people total at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child.
Does not include the Christmas Lights display.
